message.content:
Test file: src/game-of-life.spec.ts
Implementation file: src/game-of-life.ts
Passing tests: 5
Recent Green phase: Replaced hardcoded conditional with real Game of Life algorithm. Uses string keys for cell coordinates, builds neighbor-count map by iterating each live cell's 8 neighbors, then collects cells where count==3 or (count==2 AND already live).

Refactor the implementation while keeping all tests green.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, return when done.

content.text: I'll analyze the implementation, evaluate refactoring opportunities, and apply improvements while keeping tests green.
